calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement Agreement And Release Of Paga Claims Pursuant To Labor Code Section 2698 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAKEESHA ACREE'S Motion To Approve Settlement Agreement And Release Of Paga Claims Pursuant To Labor Code Section 2698 Et Seq.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve settlement agreement and release of PAGA claims pursuant to Labor Code Section 2698 et seq. is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Vedica Puri: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/VP)
